hero.subtitle: Snap a photo of any leaf. PlantPal's machine learning engine detects diseases, scores health, and gives you a personalised care plan — instantly.

features.title: Built for every plant parent
features.f1_desc: Our CNN model scans leaf images for fungal, bacterial, and viral infections with clinical-level precision.
features.f2_desc: Get condition-specific guidance — watering schedules, treatments, and fertiliser advice personalised to your plant's state.
features.f3_desc: Tomatoes, apples, grapes, corn, potatoes and more — PlantPal recognises every species in the PlantVillage dataset.
features.f4_desc: Get a clear health percentage score, confidence metrics, and visual indicators — no jargon, just clarity.

how.title: Three steps to a healthier plant
how.step1_desc: Drag & drop or browse your device. Works with any clear photo of a plant leaf.
how.step2_desc: TensorFlow scans the image, identifies the species, and checks for 38+ known diseases.
how.step3_desc: Receive a full health report with diagnosis, health score, and a personalised care plan.

diagnose.title: Upload a leaf, get instant answers
diagnose.dz_subtitle: or browse files from your device
diagnose.note: 🔒 Images are processed locally and never stored

results.empty_subtitle: Upload a leaf photo and hit Analyse Plant Health to see your full report here.
results.low_confidence_msg: This diagnosis has lower confidence. Please verify with a professional or try uploading a clearer photo.
